message:
test(fcp): verify admission slot release on decode errors and add
mock server cancellation test

fcp-raptorq/decode.rs:
- Add assertions to 3 existing tests verifying that the admission
  controller's active count returns to 0 and has_capacity() is true
  after cancellation, timeout, and insufficient-symbol errors
- Add new test: decode_with_context_cancellation_after_acquire_releases
  _admission_slot — cancels context after the decode task has acquired
  an admission slot, verifies the slot is released and a subsequent
  acquire() succeeds

fcp-testkit/mock_server.rs:
- Add mock_server_reqwest_roundtrip_inside_spawned_task — verifies
  reqwest HTTP roundtrip works correctly when called from within a
  spawned async task (tests runtime compatibility)
- Add mock_server_delayed_reqwest_honors_context_cancellation —
  sets up a 250ms delayed response, cancels context after 25ms,
  verifies AsyncError::Cancelled is returned and exactly 1 request
  was received

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
